main() depth 5 — app initialization flow: ensure_database, discover_modules, route_command. Legitimate entry point control flow.
format_time_ago() depth 5, display_feed() depth 8 — tight utilities for feed rendering. Feed display requires nested iteration over posts with conditional formatting.
_relative_time() depth 4 — utility for timestamp formatting. Tightly scoped.
_set_notification_level() depth 5 — shared notification logic (watch/mute/track). Private helper, tight coupling justified.
create_post() depth 4 — multi-step workflow (parse args, validate room, insert, mentions, sync FTS, increment count). High cohesion.
_parse_search_args() depth 5 — tightly scoped flag parsing loop. Private utility correctly extracted from run_search.
add_comment() depth 4 — multi-step workflow (parse, validate, dedup, insert, update counts, mentions, FTS). High cohesion.
retry_on_locked() depth 4 — resilient retry pattern for SQLite locking. Correct module location, well-encapsulated.
aggregate_branch_stats() depth 4 — aggregation loop over branches with per-branch error handling. Appropriate structure.
handle_command() depth 5, _handle_inspect() depth 6 — complex command routing with subcommand dispatch (craft/inspect/collab/sign). Inherent complexity from multiple artifact subcommands.
handle_command() depth 5 — multi-subcommand routing (gift/trade/drop/find/mint). Inherent complexity from varied trade operations.

get_reaction_summary() — social utility called by other branches via drone @commons for displaying reaction summaries on posts/comments
write_commons_activity() — low-level dashboard write API used by notification pipeline and external branches pushing activity data
increment_counter() and update_data_metrics() — JSON data utilities available to all commons handler modules for metric tracking
update_dashboards_for_event() — event-driven pipeline entry point called by post_ops and comment_ops after new content creation
should_notify() and get_watchers() — notification decision functions used by the dashboard pipeline to determine which branches to notify
Commons is a social gathering space, not a builder branch. Template items for builder-specific directories and READMEs do not apply to commons' social module architecture.
get_activity_stats() — profile enrichment query used by other branches to display activity stats on social profiles
get_room_state(), set_mood(), set_flavor(), set_entrance() — spatial room state API used by space module and external branch visitors
backfill_fts_index() — maintenance utility for rebuilding the FTS search index after database migrations or corruption recovery
ImportError fallback — defines error(), warning() only when aipass.cli is unavailable. Primary import is from cli.apps.modules.display.
ImportError fallback — defines error() only when aipass.cli.apps.modules.display is unavailable.
Type mismatch between cli.apps.modules.display.error(message, suggestion) and fallback error(msg, **kw) signatures — fallback needed for when CLI is unavailable.
Type mismatch on fallback error() — same ImportError fallback pattern as commons_identity.
False positive — SIGPIPE guard uses hasattr() check, no type issue.

notes.usage: Add entries to 'bypass' list to exclude specific violations

example.reason: Circular dependency - logger cannot import CLI

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
fields.lines: Optional - specific line numbers to bypass
